translations.message.tpa.self: &cYou cannot send a teleport request to yourself.
translations.message.tpa.already_sent: &cYou already sent a request to this player.
translations.message.tpa.busy: &cThis player already has a pending request.
translations.message.tpa.received: &2%requester%&a wants to teleport to you. &7/tpaccept &ato accept, &7/tpdeny &ato deny.
translations.manager.vote.not_configured: &cThe vote system has not been configured yet.
translations.manager.vote.success: &aThanks for voting! 1 vote point has been added to your account.
translations.manager.vote.fail: &cSomething went wrong while claiming your vote, please try again.
translations.manager.vote.error: &cAn error occurred while processing your vote, please try again later.

Total Cost: &g%price% vote points

translations.command.chatlock.description: Toggles the chat on or off.
translations.command.repair.name: repair
translations.command.repair.description: Repairs the item in your hand for free.
translations.message.repair.no_permission_all: &cYou don't have permission to repair your whole inventory.
translations.message.repair.tool_only: &cOnly tools, armor and elytra can be repaired.
translations.command.moneyrepair.name: moneyrepair
translations.command.moneyrepair.description: Repairs the item in your hand for money.
translations.form.moneyrepair.title: Repair with Money
translations.message.moneyrepair.item_changed: &cThe item in your hand changed, the action was cancelled.
translations.command.warp.name: warp
translations.form.warp.title: Warps
translations.form.warp.price_content: Teleporting to this warp costs &g%amount%&r. Do you confirm?
translations.message.warp.already_here: &cYou are already at this warp's location.
translations.message.warp.already_exists: &cA warp with this name already exists.
translations.manager.warp.deleted_refund: &cThe warp you were at was deleted, you were teleported to spawn.
translations.command.bounty.name: bounty
translations.form.bounty.title: Bounty Hunt
translations.form.bounty.main_content:
&7Active bounties: &c%count%

&7Place a bounty on a player, and whoever kills them claims the reward!
translations.form.bounty.info_content:
&7You can place a money reward on a player.
&7Whoever kills that player claims the entire accumulated reward.
&7Multiple players can contribute to the same bounty.
translations.form.bounty.list_content: &7Click a bounty to see its details.
translations.form.bounty.list_empty: &7There are no active bounties right now.
translations.message.bounty.no_targets: &cThere are no online players to place a bounty on.
translations.message.bounty.self: &cYou cannot place a bounty on yourself.
translations.command.slapper.name: slapper
translations.message.slapper.help:
&6=== Slapper Commands ===
&e/slapper create <type> <name> &7- Create an NPC
&e/slapper edit <id> <scale|addcmd|delcmd|name> &7- Edit an NPC
&e/slapper remove [id] &7- Remove an NPC
&e/slapper list &7- List NPCs
&e/slapper info <id> &7- NPC info
&e/slapper tpme <id> &7- Move NPC to you
&e/slapper killall &7- Despawn all NPCs
&e/slapper spawnall &7- Respawn all NPCs
translations.message.slapper.removal_mode: &eRemoval mode active. Hit the slapper you want to remove. Cancel with /slapper cancel.

translations.form.job.leave.confirm: &fDo you want to leave the %name% job? Your progress is kept.
translations.message.job.join_max: &cYou can join at most %max% jobs at a time.

translations.command.emotes.name: emotes

translations.form.emotes.usage: &eUsage: &7If you have emote permission, type the emote keys shown below in the &e:emote:&7 format to send the matching emote in chat.
translations.form.emotes.empty: &eNo emotes have been added yet. They will appear here once added.
translations.command.cosmetic.name: cosmetic
translations.command.cosmetic.description: Opens the cosmetics menu (capes, pets and more).

translations.form.cosmetic.main_content: &7Customize your character! Pick a category below.
translations.form.cosmetic.cape.title: &dCapes

Are you sure you want to delete %name%?

translations.command.claim.name: claim
translations.form.claim.title: Land Claims
translations.form.claim.content:
You own &e%count%&r out of &e%max%&r claims.
Use the button below to select a new area.
translations.form.claim.delete_confirm:
Are you sure you want to delete this claim?
&l&cNOTE: &rThis action cannot be undone.
translations.form.claim.trust_content:
Trusted players can build inside all of your claims.
Tap a player to remove them.
translations.message.claim.selection_started: &aSelection mode enabled. &7Break a block to set the &efirst &7corner, then another for the &esecond&7.
translations.message.claim.pos_first: &aFirst corner set at &e%pos%&a. Now break a block for the second corner.
translations.message.claim.wrong_world: &cBoth corners must be in the same world.
translations.message.claim.too_large: &cThis area is too large to claim.
translations.message.claim.overlap: &cThis area overlaps with an existing claim.
translations.message.claim.protected: &cThis land is protected by a claim.
translations.message.claim.untrusted: &a%name% &ahas been removed from your trusted players.
translations.message.heart.limit: &cYou have reached the maximum heart limit.
translations.message.goldenheart.limit: &cYou have reached the maximum golden heart limit.
translations.message.heart.death_lost: &cYou died! You lost &41 heart&c. Remaining hearts: &4%hearts%❤
translations.message.heart.steal: &aYou killed %victim% and stole &21 heart&a! Total hearts: &2%hearts%❤
translations.message.heart.eliminated: &cYou have lost all your hearts! Your stats and hearts have been reset.
translations.form.heartuse.title: Use Heart
translations.form.heartuse.content:
Are you sure you want to use this heart?
&l&cNOTE: &rYou can reclaim it later via &7/withdraw -> Print Heart &rat a cost.

translations.form.friend.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove §f%player% §cfrom your friend list?
translations.form.friend.request_confirm: Do you want to accept §f%player%'s §ffriend request?
translations.message.friend.no_candidates: &cNo online players available to add as friend.
translations.message.friend.request_accepted: &aFriend request accepted. &f%player% &ahas been added to your friend list.
translations.message.friend.removed: &f%player% &chas been removed from your friend list.
translations.toast.friend.removed_content: %player% removed you from their friend list.

translations.message.voteparty.broadcast: &6[Vote Party] &a%goal% votes reached! Rewards have been distributed to all players!
translations.message.voteparty.received: &6[Vote Party] &aRewards have been added to your inventory!
translations.command.duels.name: duels
translations.form.duels.title: §6Duels
translations.message.duels.target_in_duel: &cThis player is already in a duel.
translations.message.duels.target_has_request: &cThis player already has a pending duel request.
translations.message.duels.no_targets: &cThere are no online players to duel.
translations.message.duels.sender_offline: &cThe player who sent the request is no longer online.
translations.command.clan.name: klan
translations.form.clan.title: §l§6Clans
translations.form.clan.no_clan_content:
§7You are not in a clan.
§7Creating a new clan costs §a%cost%§7.
translations.form.clan.transfer_confirm_content:
§fAre you sure you want to transfer leadership to §f%player%§f?

§cYou will automatically leave the clan after transferring and this cannot be undone!
translations.form.clan.rules_content:
§7By being part of a clan you agree to the following rules:

§7• Treat clan members with respect.
§7• Do not misuse the clan treasury.
§7• Do not intentionally harm the clan.
§7• Follow server rules while representing your clan.
§7• Respect decisions made by leaders and officers.
translations.form.clan.invite_content: §fYou have a pending clan invite. Do you want to accept?
translations.form.clan.info_content:
§gClan name: §f%name%
§gClan leader: §f%leader%
§gClan description: §f%description%
§gClan power: §f%power% PW
§gClan members: §f%members%
translations.form.clan.ally_request_content: §f%clan% §fwants to become allies. Do you accept?
translations.form.clan.remove_ally_content: §fAre you sure you want to remove §f%clan% §fas an ally?
translations.form.clan.treasury_content:
§f§lCurrent Treasury:§r §a%treasury%

§7All members can deposit, only the leader and co-leader can withdraw.
translations.form.clan.home_content_set: §7You can teleport to the clan home or set a new location.
translations.form.clan.home_content_unset: §7No clan home has been set yet.
translations.form.clan.leave_content: §fAre you sure you want to leave the clan?
translations.form.clan.delete_content: §cAre you sure you want to delete §f%name%§c? §cThis cannot be undone!
translations.message.clan.no_permission: &cYou don't have permission for this action.
translations.message.clan.target_in_clan: &cThis player is already in a clan.
translations.message.clan.already_invited: &cThis player already has a pending invite.
translations.message.clan.leader_must_delete: &cAs leader you cannot leave. Delete the clan first.
translations.message.clan.transfer_not_member: &cThis player is not in your clan.
translations.message.clan.transfer_self: &cYou cannot transfer the clan to yourself.
translations.message.clan.no_transfer_candidates: &cThere are no other members to transfer to.
translations.message.clan.already_allies: &cYou are already allied with this clan.
translations.message.clan.ally_already_requested: &cYou already sent an ally request to this clan.
translations.message.clan.no_ally_candidates: &cNo other clans available to ally with.
translations.message.clan.home_set: &aClan home set to your current location.
translations.message.clan.no_home: &cNo clan home has been set yet.
translations.message.clan.cannot_hit_ally: &cYou cannot hit a player from an allied clan! §7(%clan%)
